objective: Corrective attempt 2/3 for the final B4-C fail-closed CLI. Recreate the two new files from protected main while preserving the successful attempt-1 behavior, fix direct-script repository-root imports, suppress argparse stderr on missing values, and implement a real repeated-option rejection regression. Claude Code OAuth Actions only; no paid API fallback.

material_failures: argparse printed usage and a missing-value error to stderr before SystemExit, violating the empty-stderr contract
direct execution as python3 tools/validate_canonical_repositories.py returned 1 because repository root was not inserted into sys.path before importing tools modules
the repeated --registry regression contained only pass and the implementation accepted the last repeated value, violating the explicit repeated-option requirement

attempt_lineage.attempt_2_policy: preserve all working attempt-1 file-loading, validation composition, JSON output and deterministic fault-injection behavior; correct only the evidenced failures and independently rerun the complete contract

production_contract.public_entrypoint: main(argv=None) returns an integer process exit code

imports.mandatory_order: insert the resolved repo root into sys.path before importing tools.canonical_repository_registry or tools.canonical_repository_plan, including direct __main__ execution

invalid: any repeated named option, including mixed --name PATH and --name=PATH forms
arguments.implementation_requirement: use a non-printing ArgumentParser error/exit path or equivalent; default argparse usage/error output must never reach stderr; explicitly detect repeated option destinations rather than accepting the last value

validation_order: load registry as strict UTF-8 JSON
load schema as strict UTF-8 JSON
only after registry success load plan as strict UTF-8 text

output.failure: one compact JSON object with exactly errors and valid, a non-empty sorted unique errors array, valid false and one trailing newline
output.stderr: empty on success and every declared failure path
output.serialization: json.dumps with sort_keys true, separators comma/colon and ensure_ascii false

production_contract.validator_results: preserve each real merged validator's codes after sorted unique normalization; jsonschema_dependency_missing, schema_definition_invalid and schema_validation_failed must reach the CLI unchanged

mandatory_tests.actual_script_subprocess: use sys.executable and the absolute script path; assert exit 0, exact success stdout and empty stderr from repo root and at least one different cwd
mandatory_tests.argument_matrix: each positional, unknown, abbreviated, missing-value and repeated option case asserts exit 2, exact cli_argument_invalid JSON and empty stderr; repeated test must execute production code and may not contain pass or a comment accepting the last value
mandatory_tests.override_matrix: each named override independently and all three together succeed with exact canonical temporary copies
mandatory_tests.file_matrix: registry and schema each test missing, injected unreadable, directory, invalid UTF-8 and malformed JSON; plan tests missing, injected unreadable, directory and invalid UTF-8
mandatory_tests.composition: malformed plan returns plan_section_missing; invalid schema definition returns schema_definition_invalid; schema-invalid registry returns schema_validation_failed; production lazy jsonschema import interception returns jsonschema_dependency_missing
mandatory_tests.internal_failures: patch each real imported merged validator to raise and assert cli_internal_error, exit 1, one JSON document and empty stderr
mandatory_tests.unreadable_fixture: inject PermissionError or OSError into the real production Path.read_bytes path; chmod-only tests forbidden
mandatory_tests.output_for_every_case: prove exactly one parseable JSON document, exactly one trailing newline and empty stderr
